response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and DLang developer, but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this position. He has only about six months of professional C++ experience from 2014-2015, falling drastically short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows. Furthermore, he lacks the necessary domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income, making him a poor fit for this specialized role.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, and desktop systems.
Strong background in modern software craftsmanship practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
Possesses several of the desirable skills, including scripting language proficiency, Java background, and CI/CD pipeline knowledge.
concerns: Fails the mandatory requirement of 5-10 years of C++ development experience, with only a brief 6-month stint listed.
Lacks required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking.
Does not demonstrate experience with enterprise SQL databases like SQL Server or Oracle, focusing instead on MongoDB and MySQL.
